task_intents: indicating a step in a process
example_tasks: Complete step 8 of the onboarding process
Review the 8th chapter of the manual
Track the 8th iteration of the experiment
Address the 8th point on the agenda
Update the status of task number 8
Verify the 8th component in the assembly
Prepare the 8th slide for the presentation
List the 8 items for the report
reasoning: The icon is a number within a circle. It lacks a clear visual metaphor for most productivity tasks and is too generic. It would not help distinguish tasks in a list unless the tasks are specifically about numbering or counting.
